mappings.ast:
Begin FrameSet 	# Set of inter-related coordinate systems
#   Title = "ICRS coordinates; gnomonic projection" 	# Title of coordinate system
#   Naxes = 2 	# Number of coordinate axes
#   Domain = "SKY" 	# Coordinate system domain
#   Epoch = 2000 	# Julian epoch of observation
#   Lbl1 = "Right ascension" 	# Label for axis 1
#   Lbl2 = "Declination" 	# Label for axis 2
#   System = "ICRS" 	# Coordinate system type
#   Uni1 = "hh:mm:ss.s" 	# Units for axis 1
#   Uni2 = "ddd:mm:ss" 	# Units for axis 2
#   Dir1 = 0 	# Plot axis 1 in reverse direction
#   Bot2 = -1.5707963267948966 	# Lowest legal axis value
#   Top2 = 1.5707963267948966 	# Highest legal axis value
 IsA Frame 	# Coordinate system description
    Nframe = 4 	# Number of Frames in FrameSet
    Base = 4 	# Index of base Frame
    Currnt = 2 	# Index of current Frame
    Lnk2 = 3 	# Node 2 is derived from node 3
    Inv2 = 1 	# The inverse mapping is used
    Lnk3 = 1 	# Node 3 is derived from node 1
    Lnk4 = 1 	# Node 4 is derived from node 1
    Frm1 = 	# Frame number 1
       Begin Frame 	# Coordinate system description
          Title = "Pixel Coordinates" 	# Title of coordinate system
          Naxes = 2 	# Number of coordinate axes
          Domain = "GRID" 	# Coordinate system domain
#         Lbl1 = "Pixel axis 1" 	# Label for axis 1
#         Lbl2 = "Pixel axis 2" 	# Label for axis 2
          Ax1 = 	# Axis number 1
             Begin Axis 	# Coordinate axis
                Label = "Pixel axis 1" 	# Axis Label
             End Axis
          Ax2 = 	# Axis number 2
             Begin Axis 	# Coordinate axis
                Label = "Pixel axis 2" 	# Axis Label
             End Axis
       End Frame
    Frm2 = 	# Frame number 2
       Begin SkyFrame 	# Description of celestial coordinate system
          Ident = " " 	# Permanent Object identification string
       IsA Object 	# AST Object
#         Title = "ICRS coordinates; gnomonic projection" 	# Title of coordinate system
          Naxes = 2 	# Number of coordinate axes
#         Domain = "SKY" 	# Coordinate system domain
#         Epoch = 2000 	# Julian epoch of observation
#         Lbl1 = "Right ascension" 	# Label for axis 1
#         Lbl2 = "Declination" 	# Label for axis 2
          System = "ICRS" 	# Coordinate system type
#         Uni1 = "hh:mm:ss.s" 	# Units for axis 1
#         Uni2 = "ddd:mm:ss" 	# Units for axis 2
#         Dir1 = 0 	# Plot axis 1 in reverse direction
#         Bot2 = -1.5707963267948966 	# Lowest legal axis value
#         Top2 = 1.5707963267948966 	# Highest legal axis value
          Ax1 = 	# Axis number 1
             Begin SkyAxis 	# Celestial coordinate axis
             End SkyAxis
          Ax2 = 	# Axis number 2
             Begin SkyAxis 	# Celestial coordinate axis
             End SkyAxis
       IsA Frame 	# Coordinate system description
          Proj = "gnomonic" 	# Description of sky projection
#         SkyTol = 0.001 	# Smallest significant separation [arc-sec]
          SRefIs = "Ignored" 	# Not rotated (ref. pos. is ignored)
          SRef1 = 0.070771336138736832 	# Ref. pos. RA 0:16:13.2
          SRef2 = -0.0097427456669893515 	# Ref. pos. Dec -0:33:30
       End SkyFrame
    Frm3 = 	# Frame number 3
       Begin Frame 	# Coordinate system description
          Title = "FITS Intermediate World Coordinates" 	# Title of coordinate system
          Naxes = 2 	# Number of coordinate axes
          Domain = "IWC" 	# Coordinate system domain
#         Lbl1 = "Axis 1" 	# Label for axis 1
#         Lbl2 = "Axis 2" 	# Label for axis 2
#         Uni1 = "deg" 	# Units for axis 1 (degree)
#         Uni2 = "deg" 	# Units for axis 2 (degree)
          Ax1 = 	# Axis number 1
             Begin Axis 	# Coordinate axis
                Unit = "deg" 	# Axis units (degree)
             End Axis
          Ax2 = 	# Axis number 2
             Begin Axis 	# Coordinate axis
                Unit = "deg" 	# Axis units (degree)
             End Axis
       End Frame
    Frm4 = 	# Frame number 4
       Begin Frame 	# Coordinate system description
#         Title = "2-d coordinate system" 	# Title of coordinate system
          Naxes = 2 	# Number of coordinate axes
          Domain = "PIXEL" 	# Coordinate system domain
#         Lbl1 = "Axis 1" 	# Label for axis 1
#         Lbl2 = "Axis 2" 	# Label for axis 2
          Ax1 = 	# Axis number 1
             Begin Axis 	# Coordinate axis
             End Axis
          Ax2 = 	# Axis number 2
             Begin Axis 	# Coordinate axis
             End Axis
       End Frame
    Map2 = 	# Mapping between nodes 3 and 2
       Begin CmpMap 	# Compound Mapping
          Nin = 2 	# Number of input coordinates
          IsSimp = 1 	# Mapping has been simplified
       IsA Mapping 	# Mapping between coordinate systems
          InvA = 1 	# First Mapping used in inverse direction
          MapA = 	# First component Mapping
             Begin SphMap 	# Cartesian to Spherical mapping
                Nin = 3 	# Number of input coordinates
                Nout = 2 	# Number of output coordinates
             IsA Mapping 	# Mapping between coordinate systems
                UntRd = 1 	# All input vectors have unit length
                PlrLg = 0.070771336138736832 	# Polar longitude (rad.s)
             End SphMap
          MapB = 	# Second component Mapping
             Begin CmpMap 	# Compound Mapping
                Nin = 3 	# Number of input coordinates
                Nout = 2 	# Number of output coordinates
             IsA Mapping 	# Mapping between coordinate systems
                InvA = 1 	# First Mapping used in inverse direction
                MapA = 	# First component Mapping
                   Begin MatrixMap 	# Matrix transformation
                      Nin = 3 	# Number of input coordinates
                   IsA Mapping 	# Mapping between coordinate systems
                      M0 = -0.0097182034330186694 	# Forward matrix value
                      M1 = -0.07071227359138535 	# Forward matrix value
                      M2 = 0.99744941269498555 	# Forward matrix value
                      M3 = -0.00068892079816219767 	# Forward matrix value
                      M4 = 0.99749675406165461 	# Forward matrix value
                      M5 = 0.070708917574778318 	# Forward matrix value
                      M6 = -0.99995253982885024 	# Forward matrix value
                      M7 = 0 	# Forward matrix value
                      M8 = -0.0097425915357093919 	# Forward matrix value
                      IM0 = -0.0097182034330186694 	# Inverse matrix value
                      IM1 = -0.00068892079816219767 	# Inverse matrix value
                      IM2 = -0.99995253982885024 	# Inverse matrix value
                      IM3 = -0.07071227359138535 	# Inverse matrix value
                      IM4 = 0.99749675406165461 	# Inverse matrix value
                      IM5 = 0 	# Inverse matrix value
                      IM6 = 0.99744941269498555 	# Inverse matrix value
                      IM7 = 0.070708917574778318 	# Inverse matrix value
                      IM8 = -0.0097425915357093919 	# Inverse matrix value
                      Form = "Full" 	# Matrix storage form
                   End MatrixMap
                MapB = 	# Second component Mapping
                   Begin CmpMap 	# Compound Mapping
                      Nin = 3 	# Number of input coordinates
                      Nout = 2 	# Number of output coordinates
                   IsA Mapping 	# Mapping between coordinate systems
                      MapA = 	# First component Mapping
                         Begin SphMap 	# Cartesian to Spherical mapping
                            Nin = 3 	# Number of input coordinates
                            Nout = 2 	# Number of output coordinates
                            Invert = 1 	# Mapping inverted
                         IsA Mapping 	# Mapping between coordinate systems
                            UntRd = 1 	# All input vectors have unit length
                            PlrLg = 0 	# Polar longitude (rad.s)
                         End SphMap
                      MapB = 	# Second component Mapping
                         Begin CmpMap 	# Compound Mapping
                            Nin = 2 	# Number of input coordinates
                         IsA Mapping 	# Mapping between coordinate systems
                            MapA = 	# First component Mapping
                               Begin WcsMap 	# FITS-WCS sky projection
                                  Nin = 2 	# Number of input coordinates
                                  Invert = 1 	# Mapping inverted
                               IsA Mapping 	# Mapping between coordinate systems
                                  Type = "TAN" 	# Gnomonic projection
                                  PV1_3 = 180 	# Projection parameter 3 for axis 1
                                  PV1_4 = -0.55821820758786 	# Projection parameter 4 for axis 1
                               End WcsMap
                            MapB = 	# Second component Mapping
                               Begin ZoomMap 	# Zoom about the origin
                                  Nin = 2 	# Number of input coordinates
                               IsA Mapping 	# Mapping between coordinate systems
                                  Zoom = 57.295779513082323 	# Zoom factor
                               End ZoomMap
                         End CmpMap
                   End CmpMap
             End CmpMap
       End CmpMap
    Map3 = 	# Mapping between nodes 1 and 3
       Begin CmpMap 	# Compound Mapping
          Nin = 2 	# Number of input coordinates
       IsA Mapping 	# Mapping between coordinate systems
          MapA = 	# First component Mapping
             Begin CmpMap 	# Compound Mapping
                Nin = 2 	# Number of input coordinates
             IsA Mapping 	# Mapping between coordinate systems
                MapA = 	# First component Mapping
                   Begin WinMap 	# Map one window on to another
                      Nin = 2 	# Number of input coordinates
                   IsA Mapping 	# Mapping between coordinate systems
                      Sft1 = -18.002294291694 	# Shift for axis 1
                      Sft2 = -26.619339650105001 	# Shift for axis 2
                   End WinMap
                MapB = 	# Second component Mapping
                   Begin MatrixMap 	# Matrix transformation
                      Nin = 2 	# Number of input coordinates
                   IsA Mapping 	# Mapping between coordinate systems
                      Form = "Unit" 	# Matrix storage form
                   End MatrixMap
             End CmpMap
          MapB = 	# Second component Mapping
             Begin MatrixMap 	# Matrix transformation
                Nin = 2 	# Number of input coordinates
             IsA Mapping 	# Mapping between coordinate systems
                M0 = 5.5200354944172998e-05 	# Forward matrix value
                M1 = 5.9126235790322003e-05 	# Forward matrix value
                IM0 = 18115.825541545018 	# Inverse matrix value
                IM1 = 16912.965735655434 	# Inverse matrix value
                Form = "Diagonal" 	# Matrix storage form
             End MatrixMap
       End CmpMap
    Map4 = 	# Mapping between nodes 1 and 4
       Begin ShiftMap 	# Shift each coordinate axis
          Nin = 2 	# Number of input coordinates
       IsA Mapping 	# Mapping between coordinate systems
       End ShiftMap
 End FrameSet

frames.ast:
Begin FrameSet 	# Set of inter-related coordinate systems
#   Title = "Pixel Coordinates (Detector 85)" 	# Title of coordinate system
#   Naxes = 2 	# Number of coordinate axes
#   Lbl1 = "x" 	# Label for axis 1
#   Lbl2 = "y" 	# Label for axis 2
#   Uni1 = "pix" 	# Units for axis 1 (pixel)
#   Uni2 = "pix" 	# Units for axis 2 (pixel)
#   Bot1 = 0 	# Lowest legal axis value
#   Bot2 = 0 	# Lowest legal axis value
#   Top1 = 4095 	# Highest legal axis value
#   Top2 = 4003 	# Highest legal axis value
 IsA Frame 	# Coordinate system description
    Nframe = 3 	# Number of Frames in FrameSet
#   Base = 1 	# Index of base Frame
    Currnt = 3 	# Index of current Frame
    Lnk2 = 1 	# Node 2 is derived from node 1
    Lnk3 = 1 	# Node 3 is derived from node 1
    Inv3 = 1 	# The inverse mapping is used
    Frm1 = 	# Frame number 1
       Begin Frame 	# Coordinate system description
          Ident = "FOCAL_PLANE" 	# Permanent Object identification string
       IsA Object 	# AST Object
          Title = "Focal Plane Coordinates" 	# Title of coordinate system
          Naxes = 2 	# Number of coordinate axes
#         Lbl1 = "x" 	# Label for axis 1
#         Lbl2 = "y" 	# Label for axis 2
#         Uni1 = "mm" 	# Units for axis 1
#         Uni2 = "mm" 	# Units for axis 2
          Ax1 = 	# Axis number 1
             Begin Axis 	# Coordinate axis
                Label = "x" 	# Axis Label
                Unit = "mm" 	# Axis units
             End Axis
          Ax2 = 	# Axis number 2
             Begin Axis 	# Coordinate axis
                Label = "y" 	# Axis Label
                Unit = "mm" 	# Axis units
             End Axis
       End Frame
    Frm2 = 	# Frame number 2
       Begin Frame 	# Coordinate system description
          Ident = "FIELD_ANGLE" 	# Permanent Object identification string
       IsA Object 	# AST Object
          Title = "Field Angle Coordinates" 	# Title of coordinate system
          Naxes = 2 	# Number of coordinate axes
#         Lbl1 = "x" 	# Label for axis 1
#         Lbl2 = "y" 	# Label for axis 2
#         Uni1 = "rad" 	# Units for axis 1 (radian)
#         Uni2 = "rad" 	# Units for axis 2 (radian)
          Ax1 = 	# Axis number 1
             Begin Axis 	# Coordinate axis
                Label = "x" 	# Axis Label
                Unit = "rad" 	# Axis units (radian)
             End Axis
          Ax2 = 	# Axis number 2
             Begin Axis 	# Coordinate axis
                Label = "y" 	# Axis Label
                Unit = "rad" 	# Axis units (radian)
             End Axis
       End Frame
    Frm3 = 	# Frame number 3
       Begin Frame 	# Coordinate system description
          Ident = "DETECTOR_085" 	# Permanent Object identification string
       IsA Object 	# AST Object
          Title = "Pixel Coordinates (Detector 85)" 	# Title of coordinate system
          Naxes = 2 	# Number of coordinate axes
#         Lbl1 = "x" 	# Label for axis 1
#         Lbl2 = "y" 	# Label for axis 2
#         Uni1 = "pix" 	# Units for axis 1 (pixel)
#         Uni2 = "pix" 	# Units for axis 2 (pixel)
#         Bot1 = 0 	# Lowest legal axis value
#         Bot2 = 0 	# Lowest legal axis value
#         Top1 = 4095 	# Highest legal axis value
#         Top2 = 4003 	# Highest legal axis value
          Ax1 = 	# Axis number 1
             Begin Axis 	# Coordinate axis
                Label = "x" 	# Axis Label
                Unit = "pix" 	# Axis units (pixel)
                Top = 4095 	# Maximum legal axis value
                Bottom = 0 	# Minimum legal axis value
             End Axis
          Ax2 = 	# Axis number 2
             Begin Axis 	# Coordinate axis
                Label = "y" 	# Axis Label
                Unit = "pix" 	# Axis units (pixel)
                Top = 4003 	# Maximum legal axis value
                Bottom = 0 	# Minimum legal axis value
             End Axis
       End Frame
    Map2 = 	# Mapping between nodes 1 and 2
       Begin CmpMap 	# Compound Mapping
          Nin = 2 	# Number of input coordinates
          IsSimp = 1 	# Mapping has been simplified
       IsA Mapping 	# Mapping between coordinate systems
          InvB = 1 	# Second Mapping used in inverse direction
          MapA = 	# First component Mapping
             Begin CmpMap 	# Compound Mapping
                Nin = 2 	# Number of input coordinates
                Nout = 3 	# Number of output coordinates
             IsA Mapping 	# Mapping between coordinate systems
                MapA = 	# First component Mapping
                   Begin UnitNormMap 	# Compute unit vector and norm relative to a centre
                      Nin = 2 	# Number of input coordinates
                      Nout = 3 	# Number of output coordinates
                   IsA Mapping 	# Mapping between coordinate systems
                   End UnitNormMap
                MapB = 	# Second component Mapping
                   Begin CmpMap 	# Compound Mapping
                      Nin = 3 	# Number of input coordinates
                   IsA Mapping 	# Mapping between coordinate systems
                      Series = 0 	# Component Mappings applied in parallel
                      MapA = 	# First component Mapping
                         Begin UnitMap 	# Unit (null) Mapping
                            Nin = 2 	# Number of input coordinates
                         IsA Mapping 	# Mapping between coordinate systems
                         End UnitMap
                      MapB = 	# Second component Mapping
                         Begin PolyMap 	# Polynomial transformation
                            Nin = 1 	# Number of input coordinates
                         IsA Mapping 	# Mapping between coordinate systems
                            MPF1 = 5 	# Max. power of input 1 in any forward polynomial
                            NCF1 = 3 	# No. of coeff.s for forward polynomial 1
                            CF1 = 9.6991183036463177e-05 	# Coeff 1 of forward polynomial 1
                            CF2 = -8.0862906301141211e-13 	# Coeff 2 of forward polynomial 1
                            CF3 = -1.3713569596777536e-19 	# Coeff 3 of forward polynomial 1
                            PF1 = 1 	# Power of i/p 1 for coeff 1 of fwd poly 1
                            PF2 = 3 	# Power of i/p 1 for coeff 2 of fwd poly 1
                            PF3 = 5 	# Power of i/p 1 for coeff 3 of fwd poly 1
                            IterInv = 1 	# Use an iterative inverse
                            NiterInv = 30 	# Max number of iterations for iterative inverse
                            TolInv = 1e-08 	# Target relative error for iterative inverse
                         End PolyMap
                   End CmpMap
             End CmpMap
          MapB = 	# Second component Mapping
             Begin UnitNormMap 	# Compute unit vector and norm relative to a centre
                Nin = 2 	# Number of input coordinates
                Nout = 3 	# Number of output coordinates
                Invert = 1 	# Mapping inverted
             IsA Mapping 	# Mapping between coordinate systems
             End UnitNormMap
       End CmpMap
    Map3 = 	# Mapping between nodes 1 and 3
       Begin WinMap 	# Map one window on to another
          Nin = 2 	# Number of input coordinates
          IsSimp = 1 	# Mapping has been simplified
          Invert = 1 	# Mapping inverted
       IsA Mapping 	# Mapping between coordinate systems
          Sft1 = -147.47499999999999 	# Shift for axis 1
          Scl1 = 0.01 	# Scale factor for axis 1
          Sft2 = -20.015000000000001 	# Shift for axis 2
          Scl2 = 0.01 	# Scale factor for axis 2
       End WinMap
 End FrameSet
